rows.label: qev041408_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey there, sworn sibling! You look like
you are in trouble, mo! Do you need
something from the great Tsumuji, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0002
rows.name:
It is the duty of a sworn sibling
to help out when you are in trouble!
Come on, spit it out, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain the request received from Ngogo.

rows.label: qev041408_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what this caravan does for a living.

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0003
rows.name:
Skinning beast pelts, selling
meat... Pilfering Growth weapons
and reselling them... mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0004
rows.name:
The guys in this caravan
are fearless outlaws, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Good grief, it cannot be helped, mo.
I will give him a flashy send-off with
fireworks for his final moments, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0011
rows.name:
Take the contract, mo! We are going
to launch an unbelievable firework,
so look forward to it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0012
rows.name:
We are rough-and-tumble Nopon, mo. We
beat down anyone we do not like, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Truthfully, I was planning to beat down that
sexually harassing old geezer someday too, but if
his time is almost up, it cannot be helped, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041408_MSG0014
rows.name:
I will set off a massive firework
as a parting gift for his journey
to the afterlife, mo![ST:wait ]
